title_guess: Hay on Wye (Rodnors Farm), Black Mountain Gliding, Raglan Castle

pages.text:
__Friday 28th June__  2.35.
Simon, Eve, Peter, Nana, Conrad (3½ m) + Tinder get off for Hay on Wye.  We arrive, set up the tent & walk down to the town past the 3 Tuns for a drink.  Headyswith Cider.  As we cross the bridge back to the campsite John Gaskell said "Hello Eve!"  He was out for his evening walk.  He came back to supper.  __Rodnors Farm__***** clean.

Peter & Nana & Conrad slept in the van, Simon & Eve in the tent.

__Saturday__
We walk up to the bookshops, browsed, ate Shepherd's icecreams bought food at the food festival.  At 11 we had coffee with Mrs. Gaskell & John, saw John's mental health allotment.  He gave us 2 lettuces.  We had lunch in the van & napped.  Peter dragged us off to see the map shop before it shut.  We bought maps of the areas of [?Crunachie], [?Swased] & [?Bham] canals  We had cider/beer in a lovely garden &
